contentPattern.structure: repeating priced plan: term + platform icons + savings label + strikethrough/renewal price + per-month price + Buy now CTA + fine print

commerce.note: Prices, savings %, and Buy now -> checkout.avg.com links are driven by a live commerce backend that is OUT OF SCOPE. This variant renders STATIC authored copy + verbatim CTA link structure only. Dynamic pricing is NOT wired.

suitableFor: subscription plan comparisons authored as static content
